title: Gubben kommer
writer: Stina Bergman, Gösta Gustaf-Janson, Per Lindberg
actors: Victor Sjöström, Tora Teje, Elsa Burnett
plot: The old man, Carl-Henrik de Grévy, left his family many years ago, when the stock market collapsed. His sister Louise believes that he is dead and wants to get control of her brother's property, being the sole inheritor. The Sneij...
